subcodes.first_line: O Tayfur! May thy heart be filled with light and thy soul be full of joy! That which thou didst request hath been written. Now thou must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیفور قلبت پر نور باد و جانت پر سرور آنچه خواستی مرقوم گردید حال باید
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @love and unity, @being a source of light; guidance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
